evals.name: basic-youtube-download
evals.prompt: Download this YouTube video for me: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Video downloaded successfully with confirmation of file path and video title

assertions.name: success_confirmation
assertions.description: Success message was shown to user

evals.name: audio-only-extraction
evals.prompt: I need just the audio from this Bilibili video https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1GJ411x7h7 as an MP3 file
evals.expected_output: Audio extracted and saved as MP3 file

evals.name: specific-quality-download
evals.prompt: Download this YouTube video at 720p quality: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx

evals.name: subtitle-download
evals.prompt: Download this video with English and Chinese subtitles: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx
evals.expected_output: Video downloaded along with .srt subtitle files for both languages

assertions.name: languages_specified
assertions.description: Both en and zh languages were specified

evals.name: authenticated-download-cookies
evals.prompt: Download this members-only YouTube video using my Chrome cookies: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx
evals.expected_output: Video downloaded using browser cookies for authentication

assertions.name: cookies_option_used
assertions.description: Cookies from browser option was used

evals.name: resume-interrupted-download
evals.prompt: Continue downloading this partially downloaded video file: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx
evals.expected_output: Download resumed from where it left off

evals.name: custom-output-directory
evals.prompt: Download this video to my Videos folder: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx and save it in ~/Videos/tutorials/
evals.expected_output: Video saved to the specified directory path

evals.name: list-available-formats
evals.prompt: Show me what video formats are available for this URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx
evals.expected_output: List of available formats displayed without downloading

evals.name: progress-minimal-display
evals.prompt: Download this video quietly with minimal output: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx
evals.expected_output: Download completed with minimal progress display

evals.name: yt-dlp-not-installed
evals.prompt: Download this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx (assume yt-dlp is not installed)
evals.expected_output: Installation instructions provided before attempting download
